rationale: Review 1's findings on includeRight_apply (rfl duplication of Mathlib's Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply), map_tmul/map_to* (specializations of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.* with id, confirmed by map def + simp proofs), antipode_tmul (layered on _root_.TensorProduct.antipode_def via private helper), and the private general helpers (all visible in diff) identify real reuse violations; acting on them shortens the file + increases Mathlib/TauCeti reuse. Review 2's approve leaves those in, yielding strictly worse reuse.
